title: YOUR PORTFOLIO
subtitle: CURATING YOUR BEST MOMENTS
instruction: High-quality photos help us analyze your style, energy, and authenticity for deeper matching logic.

id_card.title: ID CARD / CCCD
id_card.description: Mandatory for safety. Never shared with others. Please provide both front and back photos.

avatar.title: AVATAR PORTRAITS
avatar.description: Clear photos of your face with good lighting.

full_body.title: FULL BODY SHOTS
full_body.description: Show us your overall style and presence.

lifestyle.title: LIFESTYLE MOMENTS
lifestyle.description: Captures you in your natural element, hobbies or travels.

optional.title: EXTRA EXPRESSIONS
optional.description: Anything else you'd like to share.

limit_exceeded: You can only select up to 9 photos at a time.
incomplete_toast: Please upload all 8 required photos to continue.
already_uploaded_proceeding: Your photos are already on the system. Proceeding...
upload_failed: Photo upload failed. Please try again.
file_too_large: File size too large. Please compress your image.

visibility.title: CHOOSE YOUR MATCH PHOTO
visibility.description: Select the best photo to represent you. This photo will be shown to your potential matches.

select_at_least_one: Please select a photo to continue.
